markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To review SEO performance and explore a new content strategy for accelerated growth.](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance:** Organic traffic is recovering from a November dip with steady \~3% WoW growth, but a new initiative is needed to create an inflection point.](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=1825.0)
  - [**New Strategy:** Adopt a programmatic SEO (PSEO) model for technical "how-to" guides (e.g., "How to build a blog with Next.js"), inspired by GrowthX's work with DataGrid and Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Conversion Hypothesis:** Drive app downloads by embedding deep-link prompts in PSEO content, enabling users to execute the tutorial's code directly in the Intent app.](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [**Competitive Focus:** Aggressively target "Cursor alternative" keywords to capture high-intent users and potentially reduce paid ad spend.](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)

## Topics

### Current Performance & SEO Health

  - [Organic traffic is recovering from a November dip (from 40k to 15k page views/week) with steady \~3% WoW growth.](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=1825.0)
  - [**Technical Issues:**](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
      - [Broken redirects were identified → a fix ticket is being created.](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
      - [A canonical page is needed to resolve a ranking conflict between "cursor" and "augment" keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [**AEO:** The AEO workstream is on hold pending a clearer strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### New Strategy: Programmatic SEO (PSEO)

  - [**Goal:** Create a "big bet" to accelerate growth beyond the current incremental pace.](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [**Model:** A programmatic content engine for technical "how-to" guides, inspired by GrowthX's work with DataGrid and Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [**Content Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
      - [Highly technical, solution-oriented guides (e.g., "How to build a blog with Next.js & Sanity").](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
      - [Tool comparisons and "best X for Y" lists.](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=1674.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This content directly answers developer search intent, which is consistent across traditional search and AI prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)

### Conversion Hypothesis: Content → App

  - [**Core Idea:** Convert high-intent users from PSEO content into app users.](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [**Mechanism:** Embed deep-link prompts in guides that, when clicked, download the Intent app with the tutorial's code pre-loaded.](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)
  - [**Narrative:** Position the app as the most efficient way to execute the tutorial's workflow, building trust by demonstrating value upfront.](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)

### Competitive Strategy: Cursor Alternative

  - [**Opportunity:** Target "Cursor alternative" keywords to capture high-intent users actively seeking a switch.](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Success here could reduce paid ad spend on competitive keywords, freeing up budget for the new PSEO initiative.](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Liz:**](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
      - [Draft a proposal for the PSEO strategy, including a plan for content scale and interconnection.](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
      - [Prepare QBR materials for the meeting in \~2 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
  - [**Sylvain:**](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
      - [Define high-level quarterly goals and directional metrics to inform the QBR.](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
      - [Provide these metrics to Liz for the proposal.](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
  - [**Both:**](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=1779.0)
      - [Maintain current SEO workstreams (e.g., tool comparisons) while planning the new PSEO initiative.](https://fathom.video/share/H1DsajKqzVR3LP1sr266pgjJfdjpWX6m?tab=summary&timestamp=1779.0)
